key.name: cursor-follows-focus
key.description: Whether to automatically move the cursor to the window that's currently focused.

key.name: layout-cycle-forward
key.summary: Switch the current workspace to the next layout

key.name: layout-cycle-backward
key.summary: Switch the current workspace to the previous layout

key.name: windows-cycle-forward
key.summary: Within the current layout, cycle windows forward. The window in the current first layout element is sent to the last one, and so on.

key.name: windows-cycle-backward
key.summary: Within the current layout, cycle windows backward. The window in the current last layout element is sent to the first one, and so on.

key.name: focus-cycle-window-forward
key.summary: Focus the next window in the queue

key.name: focus-cycle-window-backward
key.summary: Focus the previous window in the queue

key.name: focus-cycle-workspace-forward
key.summary: Focus the next workspace in the queue

key.name: focus-cycle-workspace-backward
key.summary: Focus the previous workspace in the queue
